Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the camera in menu.

cameraType.Wiki: The behavior to use for this camera.

cameraBasePosType.Wiki: The reference point to use for this camera.

hitCollision.Wiki: The collision size of the camera.

fulcrumOffsetX.Wiki: The fulcrum offset on the x-axis (in metres).

fulcrumOffsetY.Wiki: The fulcrum offset on the y-axis (in metres).

fulcrumOffsetZ.Wiki: The fulcrum offset on the z-axis (in metres).

lookAtOffsetX.Wiki: The look-at focus offset on the x-axis (in metres).

lookAtOffsetY.Wiki: The look-at focus offset on the y-axis (in metres).

lookAtOffsetZ.Wiki: The look-at focus offset on the z-axis (in metres).

positionOffsetX.Wiki: The position offset on the x-axis (in metres).

positionOffsetY.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis (in metres).

positionOffsetZ.Wiki: The position offset on the z-axis (in metres).

rotHiSpeedRateIncTime.Wiki: The increase time (in seconds) for high speed rotation rate.

rotRangeMinX.Wiki: The minimum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

rotRangeMaxX.Wiki: The maximum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

rotSpeedX_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

rotSpeedX_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

rotSpeedY_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

rotSpeedY_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedX_Min.AltName: High Speed Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Speed
rotHiSpeedX_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed x-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedX_Max.AltName: High Speed Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Speed
rotHiSpeedX_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed x-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedY_Min.AltName: High Speed Rotation: Y-Axis - Minimum Speed
rotHiSpeedY_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed y-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedY_Max.AltName: High Speed Rotation: Y-Axis - Maximum Speed
rotHiSpeedY_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed y-axis rotation.

directPitchAng.Wiki: The direct pitching angle of the camera (in degrees).

directPitchRate.Wiki: The direct pitching rate of the camera.

escapeWallRotAddY.Wiki: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) added during wall avoidance for this camera.

escapeWallRotMaxY.Wiki: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) maximum used during wall avoidance for this camera.

escapeWallRotDampRatio.Wiki: The rotation decay rate of rotation adjustments during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingAngY.Wiki: The wing angle (in degrees) used during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingLen.Wiki: The wing length (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingRadius.Wiki: The wing radius (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingSeparate.Wiki: The wing spacing (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

resetMinTime.Wiki: The minimum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

resetMaxTime.Wiki: The maximum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

resetSpeedChangeRate.Wiki: The camera reset speed change rate for this camera.

startTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

endTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

startTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

endTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.
